---
title: "Computing for the Social Sciences"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: cosmo
---

### Course Schedule Summer 2026

<div class="my-4"></div>

```{=html}
<style>
/* Disable theme striping and allow kableExtra row backgrounds to show */
#schedule-table { --bs-table-bg: transparent; --bs-table-striped-bg: transparent; }
#schedule-table thead th { background-color: #fff; }
#schedule-table tbody td { background-color: inherit; }
</style>
```


```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#| label: schedule-table

library(dplyr)
library(tibble)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
library(lubridate)

# --- Input data ---
lec <- tibble::tribble(
  ~date,        ~event,                                                                  ~page,
  "2026-06-15", "Lecture 1: Course Logistics; Intro to R & Markdown",                    "01-home.qmd",
  "2026-06-16", "Lecture 2: Git & GitHub with RStudio",                                  "02-home.qmd",
  "2026-06-17", "Lecture 3: Intro to `ggplot2`; Coding Style",                           "03-home.qmd",
  "2026-06-18", "Lecture 4: Graphs for Data Analysis with `ggplot2`",                    "04-home.qmd",

  "2026-06-22", "Lecture 5: Week 1 Review",                                              "05-home.qmd",
  "2026-06-22", "Quiz 1 Due (before class)",                                             "",
  "2026-06-22", "Homework 1 Due",                                                        "",
  "2026-06-23", "Lecture 6: Intro to `dplyr`; Pipes",                                    "06-home.qmd",
  "2026-06-24", "Lecture 7: Intermediate `dplyr`; Renaming & Recoding Variables",        "07-home.qmd",
  "2026-06-25", "Lecture 8: Missing Data; Factors",                                      "08-home.qmd",

  "2026-06-29", "Lecture 9: Week 2 Review",                                              "09-home.qmd",
  "2026-06-29", "Quiz 2 Due (before class)",                                             "",
  "2026-06-30", "Lecture 10: Importing Data with `readr`; Relational Data with `dplyr`", "10-home.qmd",
  "2026-07-01", "Lecture 11: Tidy Data with `tidyr`",                                    "11-home.qmd",
  "2026-07-02", "Lecture 12: Strings and Regex with `stringr`; Dates with `lubridate`",  "12-home.qmd",
  "2026-07-02", "Homework 2 Due",                                                        "",

  "2026-07-06", "Lecture 13: Week 3 Review",                                             "13-home.qmd",
  "2026-07-06", "Quiz 3 Due (before class)",                                             "",
  "2026-07-06", "Oral checks begin (cont. through Week 4 and 5)",                        "",
  "2026-07-07", "Lecture 14: Data Structures and Base R",                                "14-home.qmd",
  "2026-07-08", "Lecture 15: Control Flow with Conditionals",                            "15-home.qmd",
  "2026-07-09", "Lecture 16: Control Flow with Loops",                                   "16-home.qmd",
  "2026-07-09", "Homework 3 Due",                                                        "",

  "2026-07-13", "Lecture 17: Week 4 Review",                                             "17-home.qmd",
  "2026-07-13", "Quiz 4 Due (before class)",                                             "",
  "2026-07-14", "Lecture 18: Control Flow with Loops (cont.); Functions",                "18-home.qmd",
  "2026-07-15", "Lecture 19: Functions (cont.)",                                         "19-home.qmd",
  "2026-07-16", "Lecture 20: Reproducible Workflow",                                     "20-home.qmd",
  "2026-07-16", "Homework 4 and 5 Due",                                                   ""
)

# --- Transform: classify and create links ---
schedule <- lec |>
  mutate(
    date = as.Date(date),
    page = as.character(page),
    page_html = ifelse(
      is.na(page) | page == "",
      NA_character_,
      sub("\\.(qmd|Rmd)$", ".html", page)
    ),
    week_start = floor_date(date, unit = "week", week_start = 1),
    DateFull = format(date, "%a, %b %d, %Y"),

    # classification
    is_lecture = grepl("^Lecture", event, ignore.case = TRUE),

    # link lectures only
    `Lecture & Assessment` = case_when(
      is_lecture & !is.na(page_html) ~ sprintf(
        '<a href="%s" target="_blank" rel="noopener">%s</a>',
        page_html,
        event
      ),
      TRUE ~ event
    )
  ) |>
  arrange(date) |>
  mutate(
    week_index = dplyr::dense_rank(week_start)
  ) |>
  group_by(week_index) |>
  mutate(
    Week = if_else(row_number() == 1, paste0("Week ", week_index), "")
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  group_by(date) |>
  mutate(
    Date = if_else(row_number() == 1, gsub(" ", "&nbsp;", first(DateFull)), "")
  ) |>
  ungroup()

# --- Build table ---
kbl <- schedule |>
  select(Week, Date, `Lecture & Assessment`) |>
  kable(
    format = "html",
    table.attr = 'id="schedule-table" class="table table-sm"',
    escape = FALSE
  ) |>
  kable_styling(
    full_width = TRUE,
    bootstrap_options = c("condensed"),
    font_size = 16
  ) |>
  row_spec(0, background = "white") |>
  column_spec(1, width = "12%") |>   # Week
  column_spec(2, width = "18%") |>  # Date
  column_spec(3, width = "60%")     # Lecture & Assessment

# --- Add bold separators between weeks ---
week_end_rows <- schedule |>
  group_by(week_index) |>
  summarise(end_row = max(row_number()), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(end_row_cum = cumsum(end_row)) |>
  pull(end_row_cum)

if (length(week_end_rows) > 1) {
  week_end_rows <- head(week_end_rows, -1)  # exclude the very last week

  for (r in week_end_rows) {
    kbl <- kbl |>
      row_spec(r, extra_css = "border-bottom: 1px solid #000 !important;")
  }
}

kbl
```


<a href="https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1LoqTK4aWxl-20byuBKuDF7Fl7dsa-5r4PcHCr_6-lC4/edit?usp=sharing" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Download the Excel version of this schedule</a>
